todos.content: Delegate research and write a single markdown report on sodium-ion vs lithium-ion for EVs to the web_agent; save deliverables to /_outputs/sodium_ion_task_output/
Render the produced files in the terminal once web_agent returns paths
Read relevant skills (tavily-cli, write-report)
Check Tavily CLI status (tvly --status) to confirm authentication
Run Tavily research/search to collect ≥12 reputable sources and extract numeric data (energy density, cost, cycle life, supply figures)
Synthesize evidence and draft report and sources files under /_outputs/sodium_ion_task_output/
Review and finalize files, then deliver file paths and short summaries
